seasonal_maintenance.headline: Seasonal Renewal for {{state}} Properties
seasonal_maintenance.fall_tips: Pressure wash your siding and decks near {{parks}} before the first freeze. This prevents mold and algae from setting in.

comparison_guide.title: Standard Cleaning vs. Deep Sanitization in {{city}}

comparison.details: Standard cleans focus on dust and floors for {{city}} homes. Deep cleans include baseboards, inside appliances, and grout scrubbing near {{neighborhood}} kitchens.
